# Copilot Instructions for app-perpustakaan-V2

# Overview
This project is a library management system with two main interfaces:
- **Admin Dashboard**: Administrators can manage the book catalog (add, edit, delete books)
- **Public Portal**: Visitors can browse and read books without authentication required

## This project uses Laravel as the main framework

## Commenting & Documentation
- All comments in source codes should be written in Indonesian

## Conventional Commits Message

Format: `type: description`

Types:
- `feat` - new feature
- `fix` - bug fix
- `docs` - documentation
- `style` - formatting
- `refactor` - code reorganization
- `test` - tests
- `chore` - maintenance

Example: `docs: add README`
